allow: PowerShell($py = "d:\\GitHub\\story-flow\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath $py -ArgumentList "-m","uvicorn","backend.main:app","--host","127.0.0.1","--port","8600" -WorkingDirectory "d:\\GitHub\\story-flow" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; try { $health = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8600/health"; $stats = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8600/vault/stats"; $stories = Invoke-RestMethod "http://127.0.0.1:8600/stories"; Write-Output "health: $\($health.status\)"; Write-Output "stats: total=$\($stats.total\) roles=$\($stats.by_role | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; Write-Output "stories: $\($stories.stories.Count\) 件" } finally { Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue })
